data.title: Decision Science Advisors Secures Series A to Scale AI for Private Equity
data.description: In New York, Decision Science Advisors, a firm specializing in Applied AI and Data advisory services for private equity investors, has secured Series A funding from Jefferies, a significant investment milestone.

data.title: 73% of CISOs Unprepared for the Next Big Cyber Attack, Incident Response Readiness Report Reveals
data.description: In the latest report by Sygnia, a leading worldwide cyber readiness and response team, they unveiled the results of their 2026 CISO Survey titled "The State of Incident Response Readiness." The survey focused on over 600 top cyber security decision-makers globally and exposed a concerning disparity between incident response planning and execution readiness. Despite a staggering 76% of organizations encountering one or more cyber attacks within the previous year, 73% of senior cyber security professionals acknowledge a gap between IR planning and operational preparedness.
Eu council: ‘ Costa to visit United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia and Qatar’

data.title: Tanger Increases Dividend by 7%
data.description: Tanger, a prominent owner and operator of outlet and open-air retail shopping destinations, revealed a significant development today. The company's Board of Directors has sanctioned a 6.8% rise in the dividend for its common shares, raising it from $1.17 to $1.25 per share annually. Additionally, they have declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3125 per share. This dividend is set to be disbursed on May 15, 2026, to common shareholders on record as of April 30, 2026. This decision reflects the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and financial growth.

data.title: SHARx: Drug Pricing Isn't Just Broken, It's Protected
data.description: There is increasing regulatory attention and reports within the industry indicating that the problem of high drug prices is not solely due to the costs involved, but also stems from a system that is set up to safeguard pricing standards. Paul Pruitt, an industry expert at SHARx, highlighted this issue. As more affordable and medically effective substitutes become available, the need for reform in the drug pricing structure becomes more apparent.

data.title: Brado AI Acquires ProviderIQ from Hatchleaf to Advance Precision Routing in Healthcare Access
data.description: Brado AI has bolstered its Conversational Engagement Platform by acquiring ProviderIQ from Hatchleaf in a move announced on April 13, 2026. This acquisition aims to integrate clinically informed, data-driven patient-provider matching capabilities into Brado AI's offerings. The acquisition is set to bring in significant enhancements to the platform's capabilities and further solidify Brado AI's position in the conversational engagement space. The specific financial details of the acquisition were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Nauticus Robotics, Inc. Announces Appointment of New General Counsel
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Nauticus Robotics, Inc. revealed that Michael Ferrier has been named the General Counsel of the company as of April 07, 2026. Nauticus Robotics, Inc. known for their work in autonomous subsea robotics and software solutions, operates under the NASDAQ symbol KITT. This news comes as John Symington, another significant figure in the company, made recent announcements.

data.title: YMX Logistics Introduces The First Autonomous Yard Operating System
data.description: YMX Logistics, a prominent third-party logistics provider, is introducing new services that highlight the integration of digital and physical yard operations for enterprise shippers. The company, based in Henderson, Nevada, made this announcement on April 13, 2026. YMX's focus on combining digital and physical yard execution aims to streamline logistics processes for businesses. This move signifies the company's commitment to optimizing operations for enterprise shippers and reinforces its position in the industry.
PARAMOUNT'S ACQUISITION OF WARNER MAY BE INVESTIGATED BY UK COMPETITION AUTHORITIES.

data.title: Nanox partners with Digital X-Ray Imaging to boost Nanox.ARC usage in Arkansas, solidifying its market presence.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The report indicates that a total of 1.2 million jobs were created in the last quarter, exceeding economists' expectations. This positive trend has been attributed to growth in various industries, including technology and healthcare. Additionally, the report highlights that the average wage has increased by 3.8% compared to last year, signaling potential improvements in the overall economy. Experts predict that if this momentum continues, the country could see further reductions in unemployment and sustained economic growth.

data.title: BrainsWay to Participate in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
data.description: In Burlington, Mass. and Jerusalem, an announcement was made on April 13, 2026, by BrainsWay Ltd (NASDAQ & TASE: BWAY), a top player in cutting-edge noninvasive neurostimulation therapies for mental health conditions. The Company shared that its management is slated to speak at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference at 8:45 AM ET on Wednesday, April 15, 2026.

data.title: Enphase Energy Expands Commercial Microinverter Deployments Across the United States
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Enphase Energy, Inc., a global energy technology company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ENPH, revealed that they are increasing shipments of commercial microinverter products from their U.S. manufacturing plants. This move comes in response to a rising interest among installers for a more straightforward and dependable option compared to conventional string inverters in the commercial solar industry. The specific products being shipped are the IQ9N-3P™ and IQ8P-3P™ Commercial Microinverters.

data.title: Scotts® Raises the Bar in Lawn Care with Innovative, Family-Safe Turf Builder® Lawn Food
data.description: A revolutionary new formula has been released by Scotts®, the top lawn care brand in North America. The latest Turf Builder® Lawn Food unveiled on April 13, 2026, in Marysville, Ohio, offers unparalleled results and provides consumers with peace of mind. This innovative product ensures that lawns are equipped to withstand real-life challenges.

data.title: Leal Therapeutics Announces Executive Leadership Appointments and Provides Business Update
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts on April 13, 2026, Leal Therapeutics, Inc. introduced new leadership. Dr. Johannes Tauscher was appointed as the Chief Medical Officer and Raymond Jordt, M.B.A., M.S. as the Chief Business Officer. Leal specializes in neuro-metabolic therapeutics.

data.title: Oracle Helps Utilities Reduce Costs and Deliver Measurable Impact with AI
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 13, 2026, during the Oracle Customer Edge Summit, it was announced that a comprehensive industry suite has been developed to streamline customer, grid, and asset operations. This integration aims to reduce costs, enhance reliability, and elevate customer experiences. The utility sector is facing challenges to finance significant infrastructure upgrades.

data.title: Boardwalk Pipelines Relocates Corporate Headquarters to Support Growth
data.description: In West Houston near the Energy Corridor, Boardwalk Pipelines, LP ("Boardwalk") revealed plans to shift its corporate headquarters to 990 Town and Country Blvd. The relocation is set to finish by fall 2026. This move signifies a significant development for the company as it accommodates its expanding operations.

data.title: RevSpring Launches Guide for Providers to Reduce Demand Leakage and Improve Provider Search Conversion on Your Domain
data.description: RevSpring, based in Nashville, Tennessee, has rolled out a new on-domain discovery feature aiming to enhance search performance and increase appointment bookings by linking provider and location directories with site content. Optional Experience Studio services are offered for advanced customization. The update was announced on April 13, 2026.
Pakistani Defense Minister Khawaja Asif: "A new round of talks between the US and Iran will begin soon."

data.title: NHC Introduces Updated Customer and Partner Portals with Real-Time Dashboards and Enhanced Visibility
data.description: Concord, Massachusetts - In a recent press release on April 13, 2026, NHC revealed advancements to its Management and Assurance Platform (MAP). The latest enhancements include upgraded Service and Billing dashboards, aimed at enhancing the accessibility and oversight of customer and partner environments. The revamped features are intended to streamline the way users can access, monitor, and administer their systems through the platform.
